description: Population frequency + family linkage summary. v2 expands family_linkage from the binary {single_family, multi_family} axis to a four-class axis reflecting the actual cheat6 jackknife verdicts, so that family-specific polymorphisms (real but restricted inversions) are distinguished from pca-family-confounded candidates (not-real, groups are wrong).
question: Q6

family_linkage.description: Four meaningful classes + unknown, derived from cheat6 jackknife verdict: multi_family = robust, segregates in many families (robust_multi_family or multi_family_contributing); few_family = 2-3 families drive it; single_family = family-specific polymorphism (real but restricted); pca_family_confounded = jackknife shows PCA groups track ancestry not arrangement (the SUSPECT case); unknown = jackknife not run or inconclusive

jackknife_n_contributing.description: number of ancestry groups whose removal drops the signal

polymorphism_class.description: Derived from family_linkage: multi_family → cohort_wide; few_family → lineage_restricted; single_family → family_restricted; pca_family_confounded / unknown → unclassified
